##NAMES=Benyacarite
##RRUFFID=R130130
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(H_2_O)_2_Mn_2_(Ti_2_Fe^3+^)(PO_4_)_4_(OF)(H_2_O)_10_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=El Criollo mine, Cerro Blanco, Tanti, Punilla, Córdoba, Argentina
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell (small piece), Rock Currier (large piece)
##DESCRIPTION=Pale yellow crystals, associated with reddish strengite, and light yellow to pale purple phosphosiderite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130130
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.5549 b: 20.731 c: 12.4898 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2732.9 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
